content:
{"cards": [{"name": "Ember Raider", "mana_cost": "{1}{R}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Creature — Goblin Warrior", "oracle_text": "Haste
Menace", "flavor_text": ""Two targets are better than one. Three are better than two. Why stop there?"", "power": "2", "toughness": "1", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Tests red's aggressive common creature design with dual keywords. At 2 mana for 2/1, it's aggressively costed but fragile. Haste enables immediate pressure, while menace makes it harder to block profitably. Follows the P+T ≤ CMC+3 rule (2+1=3, 2+3=5). Goblin Warrior ties into red's tribal themes."}, {"name": "Inferno Sovereign", "mana_cost": "{4}{R}{R}", "cmc": 6, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Creature — Dragon", "oracle_text": "Flying
When ~ enters, it deals 4 damage to any target.
Whenever ~ attacks, you may have it deal 2 damage to target creature defending player controls.", "flavor_text": "Where it flies, the sky itself burns.", "power": "5", "toughness": "4", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "Splashy mythic Dragon that embodies red's direct damage identity. 6 mana for a 5/4 flying body is reasonable for mythic. ETB bolt effect provides immediate value. Attack trigger creates interesting decisions and rewards aggression. Multiple damage-dealing abilities showcase red's specialization while avoiding color pie breaks."}, {"name": "Verdant Seeking", "mana_cost": "{1}{G}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Sorcery", "oracle_text": "Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.", "flavor_text": "The forest calls to those who know how to listen.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Classic green land search spell. Tests proper library search templating: search, reveal, put into zone, shuffle. Sorcery speed keeps it from being too powerful. 2 mana cost makes it reasonable for common ramp. Reveals the card to prevent cheating. Basic land restriction prevents abuse."}, {"name": "Ironbark Behemoth", "mana_cost": "{4}{G}{G}", "cmc": 6, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Creature — Beast", "oracle_text": "Trample", "flavor_text": "Its footsteps carve riverbeds. Its breath grows forests.", "power": "8", "toughness": "6", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Tests the upper limit of common creature stats. At 6 mana for 8/6, it follows P+T ≤ CMC+8 for common large creatures. Trample is essential on big creatures to prevent chump blocking. Double green in cost reinforces green identity. Simple design appropriate for common complexity level."}, {"name": "Wild Growth Aura", "mana_cost": "{1}{G}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Enchantment — Aura", "oracle_text": "Enchant creature
Enchanted creature gets +2/+2.
Whenever enchanted creature deals combat damage to a player, you gain that much life.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Multi-ability Aura testing enchantment templating. Follows proper Aura format with 'Enchant creature' first. Static buff (+2/+2) is green's wheelhouse. Triggered lifegain connects to green's creature-combat themes while providing incidental lifegain. Uncommon rarity allows for two abilities on one card."}]}
